channel.title: Logistics on Factorio Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Logistics on Factorio Guide

item.title: LTN Mod Guide - Logistic Train Network Setup for Factorio
item.description:
LTN (Logistic Train Network) turns trains into logistic bots. Trains automatically travel from providers to requesters based on supply and demand —no schedules needed.

TL;DR: Build a depot for idle trains. Place provider stops where items are produced. Place requester stops where items are needed. LTN assigns trains automatically. Wire every stop to chests.

The 3-Stop System

LTN requires three stop types:
